title: Cuneiform Tablet #0227: Hellenistic Medical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a medical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a medical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Hellenistic period. Medical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records medical matters typical of Hellenistic period administrative or literary practice.
